title: ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES - 211info
text: REEDSPORT APD OFFICE ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Investigates allegations of abuse due to physical harm or injury, financial exploitation, verbal or emotional abuse, involuntary seclusion, wrongful restraint, unwanted sexual contact, abandonment by the caregiver, failure to provide basic care or self-neglect (when individuals lack the cognitive ability to care for themselves, which can lead to harm). 251 NE Garden Valley Boulevard Suite A Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Age 65 and older or age 18 and older with physical or developmental disabilities or a mental health condition Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Statewide abuse reporting hotline voicemail available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. (541) 643-9829 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 643-9829 Hotline (855) 503-7233 Statewide Abuse Reporting INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to make a report or for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adult Protective Intervention/Investigation Elder/Dependent Adult Abuse Reporting Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OLDER ADULTS AND ADULTS WITH DISABILITIES SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. REEDSPORT APD OFFICE
